infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GPS Tracker needs your location to track trips and detect movement activities.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GPS Tracker needs background location access to continue tracking trips when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GPS Tracker needs background location access for continuous trip tracking and geofence monitoring.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: GPS Tracker uses motion data to detect your activity (walking, running, driving).

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GPS Tracker needs background location access for continuous trip tracking and geofence monitoring.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: GPS Tracker needs background location to track trips when the app is not in use.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GPS Tracker needs your location to track trips and detect movement activities.

plugins.motionPermission: GPS Tracker uses motion data to detect your activity (walking, running, driving).
